items.name: Cheese Bak Kut Teh
items.description: Our viral invention — tender pork chunks, fresh okra, aromatic herbal broth, topped with melted cheese. The dish that put us on the map.

items.name: Soup Bak Kut Teh
items.description: Classic herbal broth with pork ribs, garlic, and mushrooms. The traditional way.

items.name: Dry Bak Kut Teh
items.description: Braised pork in dark soy sauce with dried chilies and lady fingers. Intense and aromatic.

items.name: Creamy Chicken Cutlet Spaghetti
items.description: Crispy chicken cutlet over spaghetti in rich cream sauce. A fan favourite for a reason.

items.name: Chicken Chop
items.description: Grilled chicken chop with black pepper sauce, served with fries and coleslaw.

items.name: Spaghetti Bolognese
items.description: Classic beef bolognese sauce over al dente spaghetti.

items.name: Fried Rice with Chicken
items.description: Wok-hei fried rice with diced chicken, eggs, and spring onions.

items.name: Curry Chicken Rice
items.description: Tender chicken in fragrant curry sauce with steamed rice.

items.name: Economy Rice (3 dishes)
items.description: Pick any 3 dishes with rice. Starting from RM 3.90 — student favourite.

items.name: Spring Rolls (3 pcs)
items.description: Crispy fried spring rolls with sweet chili sauce.

items.name: Fried Tofu
items.description: Crispy fried tofu cubes with dipping sauce.

items.name: Chicken Wings (3 pcs)
items.description: Crispy fried chicken wings, marinated in house spices.

items.name: Honey Milk Longan
items.description: Our signature drink — fresh longan in honey milk. Refreshing and mildly sweet.

items.name: Kopi O (Hot/Iced)
items.description: Traditional Malaysian black coffee. Strong and aromatic.

items.name: Teh Tarik
items.description: Malaysian pulled tea with condensed milk. Creamy and comforting.

items.name: Lemon Water
items.description: Fresh lemon in iced water. Simple and refreshing.

items.name: BKT Set Meal
items.description: Bak kut teh + rice + youtiao + drink. Complete and satisfying.

items.name: Western Set Meal
items.description: Chicken chop + spaghetti + drink. Best value for hungry students.

items.name: Student Special
items.description: Economy rice + drink. Budget-friendly and filling.
